code:
import io
import string

fn rot(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    let r = b - 65 + 13
    65 + r % 26
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    let r = b - 97 + 13
    97 + r % 26
  else
    b
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      let c = string.from_byte(rot(b))
      out = "#{out}#{c}"
    when None
      out = out
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
